prompt_text:
I'm going to describe two scenarios. In the memory scenario, a novel object called a dask has a property: it can be activated by pressing the button at a specific position on it. Your job is to figure out which object in the perception scenario is the dask-analog, and therefore which button on it activates it.

Memory scenario: There are 8 objects on a table: a xav, a zop, a dask, a jorp, a zink, a clop, a thorp, and a quib. The xav is underneath the zop. The zop is to-the-left-of the dask. The dask is above the jorp. The jorp is to-the-right-of the zink. The zink is underneath the clop. The clop is to-the-left-of the thorp. The thorp is above the quib. The xav has a pink button on top, a black button on side, and a orange button on bottom. The zop has a black button on top, a pink button on side, and a orange button on bottom. The dask has a blue button on top, a brown button on side, and a yellow button on bottom. The jorp has a orange button on top, a black button on side, and a pink button on bottom. The zink has a red button on top, a purple button on side, and a cyan button on bottom. The clop has a purple button on top, a red button on side, and a cyan button on bottom. The thorp has a purple button on top, a cyan button on side, and a red button on bottom. The quib has a pink button on top, a orange button on side, and a black button on bottom. Pressing the button on the side of the dask activates it.

Perception scenario: There are 8 objects on a shelf: a jax, a trob, a lurn, a klon, a emp, a brall, a greeble, and a woz. The emp is underneath the klon. The klon is to-the-left-of the greeble. The greeble is above the woz. The woz is to-the-right-of the lurn. The lurn is underneath the brall. The brall is to-the-left-of the trob. The trob is above the jax. The jax has a purple button on top, a red button on side, and a cyan button on bottom. The trob has a purple button on top, a red button on side, and a cyan button on bottom. The lurn has a purple button on top, a cyan button on side, and a red button on bottom. The klon has a purple button on top, a red button on side, and a cyan button on bottom. The emp has a cyan button on top, a red button on side, and a purple button on bottom. The brall has a cyan button on top, a purple button on side, and a red button on bottom. The greeble has a pink button on top, a black button on side, and a orange button on bottom. The woz has a blue button on top, a brown button on side, and a yellow button on bottom.

Which object in the perception scenario is the dask-analog, and which button activates it? Answer as a fenced JSON block with keys `analog` and `button_color`.
